race.comment: RECIPROCAL (4) got too far back fresh over the mile but did warm late. Much better suited stepping out to this trip and rates highly on best figures. HAMNER SPRINGS (1) gave backers a sight fresh and battled on well to hold onto third. Less effective in town last start but should find this easier third-up and gets a key switch in Holder. Can improve sharply. MASTER OF CEREMONY (3) hasn't won for a long time but is knocking on the door, only beaten a lip last time when sent out favourite. Only needs to hold his form to be right there again. VALUED (5) hasn't threatened in his last two but has earlier form that can measure up on the quick back-up. Not dismissing.
